entries.description: PixInsight-style monolithic XISF unit: Image element carries both FITSKeyword elements (for FITS compatibility) and native XISF Property elements (Observation:Object:Name, Instrument:ExposureTime, ...), mirroring the N.I.N.A. mono narrowband light fixture.

expected.notes: FITSKeyword values are XML attribute strings (unlike FITS typed cards); P1-02 decides numeric coercion. Property elements carry the native XISF namespace (Observation:*/Instrument:*) alongside the FITSKeyword compatibility set.

entries.description: N.I.N.A.-written-style XISF unit: the FITSKeyword set N.I.N.A. documents for XISF output (EXPOSURE+EXPTIME, DATE-LOC+DATE-OBS pair), no XISF-native Property elements.

expected.notes: DATE-LOC deliberately differs from DATE-OBS (same negative control as the FITS set).

entries.description: Minimal valid XISF unit: signature + XML header with only the Image element, no keywords.

expected.notes: No FITSKeyword or Property elements at all - the structural floor of a valid unit.

entries.description: Well-formed 16-byte signature block, but the XML body has an unclosed <Image> tag.

expected.notes: Signature and declared header length are both valid; the XML fails well-formedness. Parser must return the structured error, never throw.

entries.description: First 8 bytes are not 'XISF0100' (the XML body behind it is otherwise well-formed).

expected.notes: Parser must check the signature before trusting the header length or XML at all.
